whatIs.title: What is
whatIs.description: Be a Lucky Block is a Roblox simulator where distance increases luck, the trip home increases danger, and Brainrots become the base economy that keeps paying while you are offline.

features.title: Distance-Based Luck
features.description: Farther destinations improve your reward ceiling, but every extra step makes the return more dangerous.

features.title: Brainrot Economy
features.description: Brainrots matter because they turn a successful run into passive income you keep after logging off.

features.title: Escape-Focused Loop
features.description: A run is not finished when the block rolls well. It only counts after you get the pull back to base.

faq.title: Be a Lucky Block
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for the most common first-load questions

questions.question: How often does Be a Lucky Block update?
questions.answer: The game advertises a weekly Saturday update schedule.

questions.question: What do farther destinations do?
questions.answer: Going to farther destinations gives you better luck, so pushing deeper routes is part of the core progression.

questions.question: Why do Brainrots matter?
questions.answer: Brainrots are your base economy. Once you bring them back, they keep earning cash for you, including while you are offline.

questions.question: What happens after the guards roll the Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Once the Lucky Block is rolled, you need to run back to your base before the guards catch you.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes?
questions.answer: Open the Shop menu, go to the Codes section, enter the code, and press Verify.

questions.question: Where should I check for new updates and codes?
questions.answer: Watch the Saturday patch cycle, follow the Roblox event pages, and keep an eye on the official Discord for announcements.
